tasks.title: Fix: 2017 Topps Museum Collection Baseball
tasks.objective: Repair the held action, rerun validation, and record proof.
steps: Confirm the issue still reproduces.
Patch the smallest safe sandbox fix.
Run the affected validation again.
Record proof before marking the action validated.
tasks.guardrail: Fix in sandbox first. Do not mark validated until JSON coverage or CV/ChatBot visual proof passes.

tasks.sourceId: source|hockey|2025-26 upper deck extended series hockey
tasks.title: Import missing source product: 2025-26 Upper Deck Extended Series Hockey
tasks.why: A supported source product was not found in the current Chasing Majors static checklist data.
tasks.objective: Prepare an import task for the Hockey checklist source and validate the product after publishing.
steps: Identify the affected product codes from the audit evidence.
Confirm the source Google Sheet has matching product codes and row data.
Run the correct publish function for the affected sport/year/source.
Rebuild the checklist index if products were added or renamed.
Retest the exact product query in the sandbox ChatBot and live tool after propagation.
tasks.guardrail: Sandbox/review-only. Do not update live Sheets, GitHub, or Apps Script without a separate approval path.

tasks.title: Fix: 2025 Topps Chrome Sapphire Football
tasks.why: PRV row validation did not pass.
tasks.objective: Known issue is intentionally held; convert it to a fix task when ready.
steps: Confirm the issue still reproduces.
Decide whether this is data, search, UI, or test expectation work.
Patch in sandbox and document the affected product/query.
Run the product visual test before clearing the known issue.
tasks.guardrail: Fix in sandbox first. Do not mark validated until JSON coverage or CV/ChatBot visual proof passes.

tasks.title: Import missing source product: 2025 Topps Chrome Sapphire Football
tasks.why: A supported source product was not found in the current Chasing Majors static checklist data.
tasks.objective: Prepare an import task for the Football checklist source and validate the product after publishing.
steps: Identify the affected product codes from the audit evidence.
Confirm the source Google Sheet has matching product codes and row data.
Run the correct publish function for the affected sport/year/source.
Rebuild the checklist index if products were added or renamed.
Retest the exact product query in the sandbox ChatBot and live tool after propagation.
tasks.guardrail: Sandbox/review-only. Do not update live Sheets, GitHub, or Apps Script without a separate approval path.

tasks.title: Start source-watch as review-only
tasks.why: This moves you toward AI operations without risking unauthorized live-data changes.
tasks.objective: Build review cards, then later connect spreadsheet writes behind explicit approval.
steps: Define trusted source fields: source, product, sport, claim, date, confidence, and link.
Create review-only source-watch cards in the Command Center.
Compare source claims against current PRV or Checklist Vault data.
Require admin approval before writing to Sheets or publishing JSON.
Log every approved change for later audit.
tasks.guardrail: Sandbox/review-only. Do not update live Sheets, GitHub, or Apps Script without a separate approval path.
